title: capability-monitor dedicated unit tests (BACKLOG #26, carried-forward 7.1/7.2)
description: agents/capability-monitor.mjs (~16KB) has no dedicated unit tests. Write agents/__tests__/capability-checklist.test.mjs covering: (1) schema validation of capability-checklist entries, (2) config loading, (3) the drift-detection algorithm (required capability with zero log entries for 3+ consecutive tasks fires an alert), (4) scope-creep detection, (5) checklist parsing from mock agent output. Use node:test + assert like the existing tests in agents/__tests__/. Import the module's exported functions directly (it is __isMainModule-guarded). Do NOT change capability-monitor.mjs behavior; if a function is untestable without a tiny refactor, prefer exporting it unchanged. All tests must run in `npm test`.
